ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Lyra has never lost a staring contest. Seriously, try to win against her stone cold looks. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Snakes & Stone Challenge Pack.</>

Includes:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Lyra has never lost a staring contest. Seriously, try to win against her stone cold looks. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Snakes & Stone Challenge Pack.</>

Includes:

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!  

Note: Gliders & Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString:
V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!  

Note: Gliders & Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Snakes & Stones Challenges:</> Unlock up to 1,500 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Snakes & Stones Challenges:</> Unlock up to 1,500 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
